title: ByteCraft
description: A small Fabric modpack based around ComputerCraft!
body:
Welcome to ByteCraft, a small Fabric modpack based around ComputerCraft/CC: Tweaked! This pack is decently lightweight, and should run on most modern machines.

Some mods included are:
- CC: Tweaked (+ addons)
- Create (+ addons)
- Ecologics
- Backpacked
- Sandwichable

Anyways, have fun!
- StikyPiston :D
